slides.title: Monk Mode Activated.
slides.voiceover: Meet Monk Mode Activated — a daily discipline tracker built for the long game.

slides.title: Most habit apps fail you by day 14.
slides.voiceover: Most habit apps fail you around day fourteen. Streak resets, guilt, quit, repeat. Monk Mode treats discipline as a two-year project, not a twenty-one day stunt.

slides.title: Non-Negotiables & Daily Habits
slides.voiceover: At the core are non-negotiables — the things you simply refuse to do — and daily habits, the things you commit to. Tap a box and your completion percentage updates instantly.

slides.title: Journal. Text, Voice, Photos.
slides.voiceover: Journal your day in text, voice, or photos with captions. Whatever medium your day deserves — Monk Mode catches it.

slides.title: The 2-Year Streak Tracker
slides.voiceover: The 2-year streak grid turns daily discipline into a visual identity. Every tile is a day. Every color is a percentage. Skip a day — the streak survives.

slides.title: Wrapped — Your Year in Discipline
slides.voiceover: At year-end, Wrapped builds a Spotify-style recap of your discipline — best month, longest streak, most-honored habit, and shareable cards.

slides.title: Chrome Extension Companion
slides.voiceover: A companion Chrome extension hijacks your new tab page — turning the place willpower normally dies into a live dashboard of your streak.

slides.title: Built modern, shipped fast.
slides.voiceover: Under the hood: Vite, React eighteen, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn UI. Supabase for auth, database and storage. Shipped on Lovable, deployed on every push.
Behavioral science says it takes an average of sixty-six days to form a habit — not twenty-one. Monk Mode gives you seven hundred and thirty.

slides.title: Start Day 1.
slides.voiceover: Open Productive You dot Lovable dot app, pick your non-negotiables, and start day one.
